title: FlowExecution
description: FlowExecution schema from Amazon AppFlow API

executionId.description: Specifies the identifier of the given flow run.

executionStatus.description: Specifies the flow run status and whether it is in progress, has completed successfully, or has failed.

errorInfo.description: Provides any error message information related to the flow run.

bytesProcessed.description: The total number of bytes processed by the flow run.

bytesWritten.description: The total number of bytes written as a result of the flow run.

recordsProcessed.description: The number of records processed in the flow run.

numParallelProcesses.description: The number of processes that Amazon AppFlow ran at the same time when it retrieved your data.

startedAt.description: Specifies the start timestamp for your flow run.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Specifies the time of the most recent update.

dataPullStartTime.description: The timestamp that determines the first new or updated record to be transferred in the flow run.

dataPullEndTime.description: The timestamp that determines the last new or updated record to be transferred in the flow run.
